skill.name: blockbuster-therapy-predictor
skill.description: Comprehensive analytics tool for forecasting breakthrough therapeutic technologies by integrating multi-dimensional data sources including clinical development pipelines, intellectual property landscapes, and capital market indicators.
skill.summary: Data-driven forecasting tool that evaluates 10+ therapeutic technology platforms across clinical, patent, and funding dimensions.
skill.author: AIPOCH

security_audit.summary: All 89 static analyzer findings were evaluated and determined to be false positives with one exception. The 43 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' findings are Markdown formatting (code blocks and inline code), not shell execution. The 20+ 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' findings are keyword matching artifacts on technology names and field labels - no cryptographic operations exist in the code. The 2 'Python file write/append' findings (main.py:708, 715) are TRUE POSITIVE but represent the skill's legitimate report-saving functionality via the --save parameter. The heuristics flagged 'Code execution + Network + Credential access' but no credential access or functional network code exists. The legacy audit graded this skill 'Production Ready' (85/100) with all research veto gates passing. Overall risk is LOW with safe_to_publish=true.

low_findings.title: File write via --save parameter
low_findings.description: The --save argument writes generated reports to user-specified file paths. This is legitimate skill functionality but allows file system writes controlled by command-line input. The skill code does not validate the path, though the SKILL.md security checklist claims path traversal validation is in place.

content.user_title: Predict breakthrough therapies with data-driven analytics
content.value_statement: This skill helps you evaluate emerging therapeutic technologies by analyzing clinical trials, patents, and funding data. It provides clear investment recommendations and risk assessments for biotech decision-making.
actual_capabilities: Analyzes 10+ therapeutic technology platforms including mRNA, CRISPR, and CAR-T
Calculates Blockbuster Index scores based on maturity, market potential, and momentum
Generates console and JSON format reports with investment recommendations
Filters technologies by minimum index threshold for focused analysis
Provides timeline predictions for technology commercialization
Identifies key drivers and risk factors for each therapy platform
limitations: Uses simulated mock data - not connected to live clinical trial or funding databases
Prediction accuracy is indicative only and does not constitute investment advice
Technology coverage is limited to 10 pre-configured therapy platforms
Cannot predict black swan events, regulatory changes, or market disruptions

use_cases.title: Biotech R&D Portfolio Prioritization
use_cases.description: Evaluate and rank emerging therapy platforms to guide research investment decisions.

use_cases.title: Venture Capital Investment Screening
use_cases.description: Quickly assess technology maturity and market potential for deal flow evaluation.

use_cases.title: Pharmaceutical Competitive Intelligence
use_cases.description: Track technology landscape trends and identify inflection points in drug development.

prompt_templates.title: Run Full Technology Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Run the blockbuster therapy predictor to analyze all available technologies. Show the console report with rankings.
prompt_templates.scenario: Getting a complete overview of all 10 therapy platforms

prompt_templates.title: Filter by Technology Type
prompt_templates.prompt: Run the blockbuster predictor with --tech flag to analyze only mRNA, CRISPR, and CAR-T technologies.
prompt_templates.scenario: Focusing analysis on specific therapy areas of interest

prompt_templates.title: Generate JSON Report with Threshold
prompt_templates.prompt: Run the blockbuster predictor with --threshold 70 and --output json to show only high-potential technologies. Save the results to high_potential_report.json.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating a filtered report for executive review

prompt_templates.title: Custom Analysis with Risk Assessment
prompt_templates.prompt: Run a full blockbuster therapy analysis. For each technology ranked 60 or above on the Blockbuster Index, provide a detailed risk assessment and identify the top 3 risk factors. Then suggest next steps for each high-potential platform.
prompt_templates.scenario: Deep-dive due diligence on promising therapy platforms

output_examples.input: Analyze all therapeutic technologies and show console rankings
output_examples.output: The Blockbuster Therapy Predictor generated a ranked console report showing 10 technology platforms sorted by Blockbuster Index. mRNA ranked first with a score of 85.2, followed by CAR-T at 82.3 and CRISPR at 79.8. Each technology includes maturity, market potential, and momentum scores with investment recommendations.

output_examples.input: Filter analysis for mRNA and CRISPR only
output_examples.output: Analysis focused on 2 selected technologies. mRNA scored 85.2 with a Strongly Recommended rating, driven by multiple Phase III trials and rapid patent growth. CRISPR scored 79.8 with a Recommended rating, driven by strong market potential for gene editing applications.

output_examples.input: Show only technologies with Blockbuster Index above 70
output_examples.output: Applied a threshold filter of 70 on the Blockbuster Index. Six technologies passed the threshold: mRNA (85.2), CAR-T (82.3), CRISPR (79.8), Bispecific (77.5), ADC (76.2), and Gene Therapy (71.4). Each platform received detailed scoring and a commercialization timeline prediction.

best_practices: Validate input parameters before running analysis to ensure correct technologies and thresholds are selected.
Use --output json with the --save flag when generating reports for documentation or further analysis.
Review risk factors and timeline predictions alongside Blockbuster Index scores for balanced decision-making.
anti_patterns: Using the predictor as the sole basis for investment decisions without consulting domain experts and regulatory guidance.
Running the tool with default parameters without setting threshold filters appropriate for the use case.
Extending analysis to technologies not included in the pre-configured platform list without proper data validation.

faq.question: What data sources does the predictor use?
faq.answer: The current version uses simulated mock data for demonstration. Real-time data integration is planned for future releases.

faq.question: Can I add new technologies to analyze?
faq.answer: New technologies can be added by extending the mock data in scripts/main.py. Reliable predictions require accurate real-world data inputs.

faq.question: Is this tool suitable for making investment decisions?
faq.answer: No. The tool provides quantitative analysis for decision support only. All decisions should incorporate domain expertise and regulatory consultation.

faq.question: What is the Blockbuster Index?
faq.answer: The Blockbuster Index is a composite score combining Market Potential (50 percent weight), Maturity (30 percent), and Momentum (20 percent) to rank therapy platforms.

faq.question: Does the tool make network calls or access external APIs?
faq.answer: No. The tool uses built-in mock data and does not make any external network calls. All analysis runs locally.

faq.question: What output formats are available?
faq.answer: The tool supports console output with formatted tables and JSON output for programmatic use. Reports can be saved to files using the --save parameter.
